ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccine_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "constraint_millions" REAL /* Budget constraint in millions of dollars */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to scenario_id in scenarios table */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to coverage_id in coverage_levels table */,
  "total_clin_cases_averted_thousands" TEXT /* Total clinical cases averted in thousands (range) */,
  "total_sev_cases_averted_thousands" TEXT /* Total severe cases averted in thousands (range) */,
  "total_deaths_averted_thousands" TEXT /* Total deaths averted in thousands (range) */,
  "clin_cases_averted_per_1000_doses" INTEGER /* Clinical cases averted per 1000 doses */,
  "num_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries involved */,
  "country_list" TEXT /* List of countries involved in the scenario */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "published_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the report is published or draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Three-letter country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the country's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the country's capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario (e.g., Maintain 2016, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_levels" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage level */,
  "coverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the coverage level (e.g., Realistic coverage, 100% coverage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to impact_id in vaccine_impact table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "published_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the report is published or draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to report_id in reports table */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Binary data containing the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_impact_data_sources" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to impact_id in vaccine_impact table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to data_source_id in data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id", "data_source_id")
)
